title: Diagnostics of TCM（中医诊断学）
description: Diagnostics of TCM in our university is a national top quality course, key discipline of State Administration of TCM, and national top quality resource-sharing course, leaded by Chengyu Wu, a nationally famous teacher, doctoral supervisor and second-class professor. This is an online course taught in English, which can be used for students' independent study. It aims to help students cultivate unique thinking mode of diagnosis and treatment of TCM as well as bilingual thinking at the beginning of their TCM study, so as to build up their knowledge and ability to become advanced TCM talents as well as international TCM talents in the future. This course is available for undergraduate students, adult students receiving higher education, graduate students and Chinese medicine enthusiasts.

instructors.name: 谷鑫;胥波;沈怡婷;史话跃;张晗;徐征;任威铭;张箫箫;顾任钧;钱峻;张玲玲;姚颖
